title: Expose Architecture field in podman images / list images API response
body:
### Feature request description

 Include Architecture (and ideally Os and Variant) in the image summary returned by:
 - podman images (with --format support, e.g. {{.Architecture}})
 - GET /libpod/images/json API endpoint

This would allow a single call to retrieve architecture information for all images.

At the moment, we are using `podman images` to gather the Ids and then using those with `podman inspect` (fortunately this accepts an array of ids so it's not (N+1))

## Use case

Managing images across multiple architectures (e.g. amd64, arm64) where you need to quickly audit or filter the local store by architecture without inspecting each image individually.



### Suggest potential solution

It would be nice to do the following:

 ```bash
podman images --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}} {{.Architecture}}'
 ```


### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: Well, the architecture of the image is a trap. But I will try to do. I plan to dig deep into arch/variant, etc.

> Well, the architecture of the image is a trap. But I will try to do. I plan to dig deep into arch/variant, etc. 

That's fair. I mean this is a pretty specific use case and fortunately we can pass multiple ids into the podman inspect command, so we have a workaround.

Thanks for looking into it
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
